Container.Name: SpotifyBU
Container.Overview: SpotifyBU backs up Spotify playlists, songs, and albums into a local Navidrome-ready music library. Set PUID/PGID to match NaviClean/Navidrome when sharing the same music library.
Container.Description: SpotifyBU connects to Spotify for playlist, song, album, and metadata reads; checks the mounted Navidrome music folder; automatically searches YouTube first and JioSaavn second for missing tracks; stages user-confirmed provider downloads; tags files; and moves completed audio into stable Artist - Album folders. Provider downloads do not use provider account connections; users review the selected candidate and confirm they are authorized to download it. Bulk jobs run in throttled chunks and can trigger throttling, captchas, or provider blocks. When SpotifyBU shares a music library with NaviClean or Navidrome, set matching PUID/PGID values so all containers can move and rename the same files.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Container 3000 - Host port for the SpotifyBU web UI

Config.Name: Config Folder
Config.Description: Stores SpotifyBU settings and changed app login credentials

Config.Name: Navidrome Music Library
Config.Description: Host music folder that Navidrome scans. This must be the real music folder, not Navidrome appdata/config. SpotifyBU needs read/write access and stores its index under /music/.spotifybu.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Unraid user ID used by SpotifyBU for /config and /music access. Match NaviClean/Navidrome on shared libraries; 99 is Unraid's default nobody user.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Unraid group ID used by SpotifyBU for /config and /music access. Match NaviClean/Navidrome on shared libraries; 100 is Unraid's default users group.

Config.Name: Spotify Client ID
Config.Description: Spotify Developer Dashboard app Client ID. SpotifyBU uses PKCE and does not need or ask for the Spotify Client Secret.

Config.Name: SpotifyBU App Secret
Config.Description: Long random value used to sign SpotifyBU's own login sessions. This is not your Spotify app Client Secret.

Config.Name: Navidrome URL
Config.Description: Navidrome URL as seen by the SpotifyBU container. Used with optional Navidrome credentials to ping Navidrome and request server-side scans.

Config.Name: Navidrome Username
Config.Description: Optional Navidrome username. Required only if SpotifyBU should ping Navidrome and request a Navidrome-side library scan after indexing or staging files.

Config.Name: Navidrome Password
Config.Description: Optional Navidrome password for the username above. Required only for Navidrome API scan requests; the mounted music folder scan does not use this.

Config.Name: Public App URL / Reverse Proxy URL
Config.Description: Exact SpotifyBU base URL used for Spotify OAuth redirects. Spotify requires HTTPS except for loopback IPs such as http://127.0.0.1:3000. Normal Unraid/LAN installs should use an HTTPS reverse proxy, internal HTTPS hostname, VPN, or tunnel URL, then add NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL/api/auth/callback to the Spotify app.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set true when SpotifyBU is accessed over HTTPS. Leave false only for direct HTTP/loopback testing.

Config.Name: Chown Music Library
Config.Description: Advanced repair option. Leave false unless you intentionally want SpotifyBU startup to recursively chown the entire mounted music library to PUID:PGID.

Config.Name: Branch Label
Config.Description: Branch label shown in the SpotifyBU footer
